_comment: MATHIR Playground — user-editable config. All paths are RELATIVE to this config file (or absolute if needed). Edit this file to add/remove models and change settings. NO hardcoded paths in code.
_v8.5.0: Supports 2 providers: OpenRouter (cloud LLM gateway, 26 free models) and OpenCode Zen (curated free models via opencode.ai/zen/v1). Both use OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions API.
_v8.5.1: Added local llama.cpp support via `local_llama_cpp.py`. Use GGUF models locally with optional mmproj for multimodal (vision). Falls back to OpenRouter/Zen if llama-cpp-python is not installed. Added Ollama provider for local model server.

openrouter._comment: OpenRouter cloud API config. api_key can also be set via OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var (recommended).

opencode_zen._comment: OpenCode Zen (opencode.ai/zen) — curated free models. api_key can be set via OPENCODE_ZEN_API_KEY env var. Get key at https://opencode.ai/auth.

ollama._comment: Ollama local model server. Install: https://ollama.ai. Pull models: `ollama pull gemma2:9b`. Default URL: http://localhost:11434 (set OLLAMA_HOST env var to override).

llama_local._comment: Local GGUF models via llama-cpp-python. No API key needed. Provide path to .gguf file (and optional mmproj for vision). Install: `pip install llama-cpp-python`

my-gguf-model.description: Local GGUF model — edit path and mmproj in config.json

models._comment: Each model has a 'provider' field (openrouter | opencode_zen) that determines where the API call goes. If omitted, defaults to openrouter for backward compat.

google/gemma-4-26b-a4b-it:free._comment: Google Gemma 4 26B A4B IT (free) — vision+video+text, 262K context. v8.5.0 verified working.

openrouter/free._comment: OpenRouter auto-routing free model (text+image). Good fallback when others 429.
openrouter/free.description: OpenRouter automatic free model selection, text+image, 200K context

nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl:free._comment: NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 12B v2 VL (free) — vision-language, 128K context.
nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl:free.description: NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 12B v2, vision+text, 128K context

openai/gpt-oss-120b:free._comment: OpenAI GPT-OSS 120B (free) — text-only, 131K context. Strong for chat.
openai/gpt-oss-120b:free.description: OpenAI GPT-OSS 120B, text-only, 131K context, reasoning model

nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free._comment: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super 120B (free) — text-only, 1M context. Best chat quality.

mimo-v2.5-free._comment: OpenCode Zen — MiMo V2.5 (free, Xiaomi). v8.5.0 verified working. NOTE: model ID has NO 'opencode/' prefix for Zen — that's a display name only.
mimo-v2.5-free.description: OpenCode Zen curated Xiaomi MiMo V2.5, free, text-only, multilingual

deepseek-v4-flash-free.description: OpenCode Zen curated DeepSeek V4 Flash, free, text-only

north-mini-code-free._comment: OpenCode Zen — North Mini Code (free). May retain data, do not submit personal info.
north-mini-code-free.description: OpenCode Zen curated North Mini Code, free, text-only, code-specialized (data may be retained)

nemotron-3-ultra-free._comment: OpenCode Zen — Nemotron 3 Ultra (free, NVIDIA). Trial use only.
nemotron-3-ultra-free.description: OpenCode Zen curated NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, free, text-only, trial use

_add_model_help.how_to_add: Edit this config to add any model. The 'provider' field determines where the API call goes.

providers.openrouter: Cloud API (requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY). Browse models: https://openrouter.ai/models
providers.ollama: Local model server (requires Ollama running). Pull models: `ollama pull <model>`
providers.llama_local: Local GGUF via llama-cpp-python. No API key. Provide path to .gguf file + optional mmproj.
